name: IpGetSocketOption
title: IpGetSocketOption
syntax: long IpGetSocketOption( dword socket, char level[], char name[], long &value);
description: The function reads the value of the given socket option.
The function is dependent on the selected stack.

parameters.name: level
parameters.description: The level at which the option is defined, e.g. SOL_SOCKET (0xFFFF). See Socket Options for all supported socket levels.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The socket option name to be read, e.g. SO_BROADCAST (0x0020). See Socket Options for all supported socket options.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The value of the socket option will be returned in this variable.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
